title: UHS (UHS) Intrinsic Value — Gemini 3.1 DCF Analysis
description: Universal Health Services, Inc., through its subsidiaries, owns and operates acute care hospitals, behavioral health centers, surgical hospitals, ambulatory surgery centers, and radiation oncology centers. It is one of the largest and most respected providers of hospital and healthcare services in the United States and the United Kingdom.

assumptions.revenueGrowth: 7.5% - Projected average annual growth rate, driven by strong acute care volumes, price increases, and behavioral health recovery.
assumptions.terminalGrowthRate: 2.5% - Assumes perpetual growth in line with general healthcare inflation and demographics.
assumptions.discountRate: 9.5% - Derived using CAPM, incorporating a beta of 1.26 to reflect regulatory risks and operating leverage.
